title: Human-Centred AI Project Lifecycle
description: A flowchart illustrating the iterative, human-in-the-loop process for completing a course project in Human-Centred AI.
relationships: An iterative flow connecting each element to the next, with feedback loops from 'Evaluation with Users' and 'Analysis & Refinement' back to earlier stages like 'Design & Prototyping' and 'User Research'.
